texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ❖ Rates are inclusive of all Government taxes
texts.text: ❖ Rates are inclusive of all Government taxes

texts.label: list_item

texts.text: o Rates are subject to change without prior notice and subject to availability, however, every effort will be made to maintain them.

texts.text: o Single Room (1 adult): 25% of adult single rate per child, as per board type
